nasb.text: For in the case of those who have once been enlightened and have tasted of the heavenly gift and have been made partakers of the Holy Spirit,

esv.text: For it is impossible, in the case of those who have once been enlightened, who have tasted the heavenly gift, and have shared in the Holy Spirit,

cnv.text: 因為那些曾經蒙了光照，嘗過屬天的恩賜的滋味，與聖靈有分，

ccb.text: 有些人曾蒙上帝光照，尝过天赐恩典的滋味，有份于圣灵，

csbs.text: 原来，如果有人蒙过一次光照、尝过属天恩赐的滋味、曾经与圣灵有份、
